data.biography: Claudia Jessie Peyton (born October 30, 1989) is an English actress. She is known for her roles in the third series of the BBC One police procedural WPC 56 (2015) and as Eloise, the fifth Bridgerton child, in the Netflix period drama Bridgerton (2020–present). She also had roles in series 4 of Line of Duty (2017), the Dave sitcom Porters (2017–2019) and the ITV miniseries Vanity Fair (2018).
data.name: Claudia Jessie

data.biography: Клаудия Джесси Пейтон — английская актриса. Она известна своими ролями в третьей серии WPC 56, мини-сериале ITV Vanity Fair, четвертой серии Line of Duty, ситкоме Dave Porters и исторической драме Netflix Bridgerton.
data.name: Клаудия Джесси
